# Skills Index for Agents

Use this index to quickly find runnable guidance.

## Available skill packs
- `wote-evaluation`
  - Skill spec: `wote-evaluation/SKILL.md`
  - Live status/handoff: `wote-evaluation/SESSION_STATUS.md`

## Recommended read order
1. `wote-evaluation/SKILL.md`
2. `wote-evaluation/SESSION_STATUS.md`
3. `/home/wenzhe/wm_ws/WoTE/AGENT_HANDOFF.md`

## Environment note
- Python execution should use conda env `wote` unless explicitly overridden.
